diagrams.title: Closure Properties Venn Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows which operations preserve CFL property and which do not
diagrams.purpose: Visualize which operations keep us within CFL class and which escape it

diagrams.title: Language Class Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows relationship between Regular, CFL, CSL, and RE languages
diagrams.purpose: Understand where CFLs sit in Chomsky hierarchy and how closure properties compare across classes

diagrams.title: Proof Construction: CFL ∩ Regular = CFL
diagrams.description: Shows PDA + DFA product construction for intersection with regular language
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how to construct a PDA that checks both CFL and regular language properties simultaneously

visuals.title: Closure Properties Of Context Free Languages
visuals.description: Visual diagram for closure properties of context free languages
